setup.title: Firebat Initial Setup
setup.subtitle: Configure administrator account, language, and timezone
setup.password_hint: 8+ characters with at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, number, special character. Cannot match the ID.
setup.err_password_policy: Password must be 8+ characters and include at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, number, special character.
setup.err_password_same_as_id: Password cannot be the same as the ID.
setup.err_failed: An error occurred. Please try again.

admin_chat.no_model_error: ⚙ Open Settings → AI tab, configure an API key or CLI authentication, then select a model.
admin_chat.fallback_empty_reply: No response received. Please try again.
admin_chat.fallback_timeout: Server didn't respond in 2 minutes. Possibly SSE disconnect — please retry.

settings.interface_lang_desc: Language for the admin interface. Independent from the public site language (set in CMS settings).
settings.admin_credentials_desc: Current password is required. Leave fields blank to keep existing values.
settings.admin_credentials_warning: ⚠ Changing the password invalidates all existing login sessions. API tokens used by external tools (MCP / API) are NOT automatically revoked — for stronger security, regenerate them in the MCP tab.

page.not_found_message: The page you requested does not exist or has moved.
page.error_message: An error occurred while processing your request. Please try again in a moment.

common.no_settings: No settings available for this module.
common.og_size_hint: 1200×630px · Refresh after saving to reflect changes
common.verifications_content_placeholder: File content (e.g. ads.txt standard line, Google site-verification meta, etc.)
common.token_warning: This token cannot be viewed again. Copy it now.
common.token_none: No token. Generate one to use SSE (API) connections.
common.token_revoke_message: Revoking the token will immediately block the associated connection. Continue?
common.token_regenerate_message: The existing token will be invalidated. Generate a new token?
common.mcp_app_desc: External AI tools (Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, etc.) can connect to this Firebat server.
common.mcp_llm_desc: Used when external LLMs such as OpenAI Responses API (hosted MCP) or Claude API need access to Firebat's full toolset.
common.mcp_sse_hint_llm: Add the configuration below to the tools array of the OpenAI Responses API (Claude API uses the same URL).
common.mcp_sse_hint_app: Add the JSON below to your VS Code / Cursor MCP settings.
common.mcp_stdio_hint: Connects directly to the server via SSH.
common.mcp_stdio_ssh_required_body: stdio mode requires an SSH key registered on the server. Ask your server administrator to register your SSH public key.
common.mcp_stdio_ssh_required_note: Replace SSH_KEY_PATH, USER, SERVER_IP, and the firebat path with actual values.

widget_list.empty: No widgets registered. Add one with the button below.
